info.title: Motorzad API Documentation
info.description: API Documentation for Motorzad Car Auctions Platform.

post.description: Registers a new customer and sends an OTP to their email.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

message.example: Registration successful. Please complete your profile.

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns an access token.
Revokes the user's current access token.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile information.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile details.

422.description: Validation error or incorrect old password

post.description: Uploads a new profile photo for the authenticated user.
Sends an OTP to the user's email to reset their password.

message.example: Password reset OTP sent to your email.

post.description: Verifies the OTP and sets a new password.

message.example: Password reset successfully. You can now login.

post.description: Verifies the authenticated user's email using the 6-digit OTP code sent during registration.
Regenerates and resends the 6-digit OTP verification code to the authenticated user's email.

message.example: Verification OTP sent to your email.

get.description: Returns the identity verification status of the currently authenticated user.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

post.description: Allows the authenticated user to upload national ID and selfie images to request identity verification.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

id_image.description: Identity document image (JPEG, PNG, JPG, max 2MB)

selfie_image.description: Selfie holding document (JPEG, PNG, JPG, max 2MB)

message.example: You already have a pending verification request.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all past KYC verification requests submitted by the authenticated user.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

post.description: Generates a 6-digit OTP and sends it via phone or email. In local or debug mode, the code is returned in the response for easy testing.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)

post.description: Verifies the OTP code. If correct and user exists, authenticates them. If they do not exist, automatically registers them as a bidder and returns access token.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: The language of the response (ar, en)
